channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Liberals call for 'MAGA' to ‘give thanks to undocumented immigrants’ on Thanksgiving
item.description: Julian Castro, the former San Antonio mayor and Obama admin official, was lambasted on X for saying President-elect Donald Trump supporters should give thanks to undocumented immigrants.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Supreme Court will hear arguments over Tennessee's ban on gender-affirming care for minors
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Advocates for transgender rights are turning to a conservative-dominated Supreme Court after a presidential election in which Donald Trump and his allies promised to roll back protections for transgender people.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN and GEOFF MULVIHILL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The outlook is uncertain for AI regulations as the US government pivots to full Republican control
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — With artificial intelligence at a pivotal moment of development, the federal government is about to transition from one that prioritized AI safeguards to one more focused on eliminating red tape.
item.dc:creator: DAN MERICA and ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What is Evacuation Day? The forgotten holiday that predates Thanksgiving
item.description: Before Thanksgiving became the prominent late November holiday, much of America celebrated "Evacuation Day" – commemorating the day the last Redcoats fled New York in 1783.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republican Miller-Meeks wins reelection after recount in close Iowa congressional race
item.description: DES MOINES, Iowa (AP) — Republican Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks won her reelection bid Wednesday after a recount confirmed her lead, helping her party pad its thin majority in the U.S. House and retain control of all four of Iowa’s congressional seats.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH FINGERHUT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russia expels two German journalists in tit-for-tat retaliation, ministry says
item.description: MOSCOW (AP) — Russia's Foreign Ministry said Wednesday it has revoked the accreditation of two employees with the German ARD broadcaster and ordered them to leave the country in what it described as a retaliation to German authorities' move targeting two journalists from Russia's state TV.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump picks Jay Bhattacharya, who backed COVID herd immunity, to lead National Institutes of Health
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has chosen health economist Dr. Jay Bhattacharya, a critic of pandemic lockdowns and vaccine mandates, to lead the National Institutes of Health, the nation's leading medical research agency.
item.dc:creator: CARLA K. JOHNSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: President Trump endorses Patronis & Fine for congressional seats
item.description: Two Florida leaders are already emerging as potential frontrunners to replace Former Congressman Matt Gaetz and current U.S. Representative Mike Waltz in D.C.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Schools, crime getting attention in early bills submitted for 2025 Nevada Legislature
item.description: Lawmakers are getting a jump on what promises to be a heavy workload for the 83rd Legislative Session in Carson City. So far, 160 bills have been filed.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump 'border czar' willing to 'jail' Denver mayor over deportation position
item.description: "But, look, me and the Denver mayor, we agree on one thing. He’s willing to go to jail, I’m willing to put him in jail.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Appeals court agrees to end Trump’s classified documents case
item.description: The 11th Circuit Court of Appeals on Tuesday granted a request from special counsel Jack Smith to drop President-elect Trump’s Florida documents case, ending the battle to charge him over retaining records with classified markings after leaving office.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Lauren Boebert Cameo page disappears amid House ethics concerns
item.description: Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-Colo.) briefly offered videos on Cameo, a website on which public figures sell personalized videos to fans, before the page went offline amid questions about whether it would have violated House ethics rules.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's hush money case in limbo after judge adjourns sentencing
item.description: New York Judge Juan Merchan faces a choice of freezing President-elect Trump's hush money case in place until he leaves the White House or tossing it entirely, underscoring how Trump's election win has changed the dynamic of his legal travails.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: 5 takeaways as Trump rounds out his second Cabinet
item.description: President-elect Trump is rounding out his Cabinet just a few weeks after securing a second White House term, filling the top jobs that will carry out his agenda in the years to come.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's favorability climbs in post-election poll
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s favorability climbed by six points after he was elected president earlier this month, a new poll on Tuesday found.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Trump has promised lower taxes. These are 3 ways it could impact you
item.description: From "no tax on tips" to Social Security, Donald Trump has made a range of promises about the taxes Americans will pay. We take a look at three changes we could see in the months ahead.
item.dc:creator: Laurel Wamsley, MPR News

item.title: Post-election poll: Trump victory, cabinet choices, war, and aliens through voters' eyes
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's popularity is on the rise and the voters who went against him think World War III is likely.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump is promising big cuts. Impoundment is one axe he wants to wield
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump wants to roll back spending that Congress has already approved. But a 1974 law may stand in his way.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez, MPR News

item.title: State bar counsel filed 2 complaints against Clark County Commissioner Justin Jones
item.description: The office of the state bar counsel, in its effort to discipline Clark County Commissioner Justin Jones, filed a complaint in February 2024 and another in October where it alleges Jones violated several rules of professional conduct, according to documents the 8 News Now Investigators have obtained.
item.dc:creator: Kyle J. Paine, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump pledges Mexico, Canada, China tariffs over border, fentanyl
item.description: "Thousands of people are pouring through Mexico and Canada, bringing Crime and Drugs at levels never seen before," Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation
